inputs.label: Distance
inputs.businessContext: The total distance of the trip in miles.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total distance of the trip in miles.

inputs.label: Duration
inputs.businessContext: The total duration of the trip in minutes.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total duration of the trip in minutes.

inputs.label: Base Fare
inputs.businessContext: The fixed pickup charge applied to every ride.

businessContext_i18n.en: The fixed pickup charge applied to every ride.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her yolculukta uygulanan sabit alma ücreti.

inputs.label: Cost per Mile
inputs.businessContext: The rate charged per mile traveled.

businessContext_i18n.en: The rate charged per mile traveled.

inputs.label: Cost per Minute
inputs.businessContext: The rate charged per minute of trip time.

businessContext_i18n.en: The rate charged per minute of trip time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Seyahat süresinin dakikası başına ücretlendirilen oran.

inputs.label: Booking Fee
inputs.businessContext: A flat service fee added to every ride.

businessContext_i18n.en: A flat service fee added to every ride.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her yolculuğa eklenen sabit hizmet ücreti.

inputs.label: Surge Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: A demand-based multiplier applied to the sum of base, distance, and time charges.

businessContext_i18n.en: A demand-based multiplier applied to the sum of base, distance, and time charges.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Taban, mesafe ve zaman ücretlerinin toplamına uygulanan talep bazlı çarpan.
